video.title: GC Shake-Up On Relentless Day Of Racing | Giro D'Italia 2022 Stage 14 Highlights

transcript.clean_text: the day before the big turin test of the jedi italian hormone balder had to abandon the race stage 13 unlucky for him he had to withdraw with illness as alno dimal proved once again to be the strongest sprinter in this particular tour of italy a third stage win a bunch kick that was only secured when the breakaway was caught 600 meters from the line the attention now turned to another breakaway or a gc day with juanpe lopez spending his tenth day in the malaya rosa for a hansgrove with their strong lineup and gc cards to play taking on the 147 kilometer run between santana and torino turin playing host to the hilly stage of this year's cheered italia with two circuits to be taken on around its wonderfully scenic hills that meant a couple of the sense of superga the cole de la madalena and a technical descent to the finish line in the city center the shortest road stage of the jira italia but with 3 000 meters of climbing packed into the second two thirds the stage started in typically explosive fashion matchup on the pool tried alone for around 15 kilometers but was unable to force the issue several attempts at making a breakaway began and things only started to settle down and only for a brief period after around 40 kilometers settle down at the front that is because at the back riders were all over the place the group that got out there didn't manage to hold on to their advantage for too long though that was because with 80 kilometers to go borah hans grew up began to execute their plan that plan was to rip up the race aleoti working hard then pushing on the descent and the gap only at just over a minute he'd finish his job once they were through the finish line with 70 k's to go the breakaway caught and borohan scored driving it at the front alejandro balber they've been one of those riders called out also losing on the day really were hugh carthy and joao guillermo missing a split whereas matan missed it almeida would work his way onto the back wilco calderon was doing the damage at this point and still with 65 kilometers to go valverde still continuing to lose time martin tried and tried but he'd end up out of the picture and as they rode into hell the last 50 kilometers simon yates was the only man at the front not also involved in the gc shake-up yates was there looking for a stage win balberde was continuing to slip down the gc standings the bell rang with one lap to go kelderman finished this work and the first attacks came hindley made his move calapas could follow vincenzo nibely looks surprisingly almost back to his best carapace himself would then try 31 k's to go and juanpe lopez was defending wonderfully well cara passes attack with 28.6 k's remaining was the one that broke the front group nobody able to follow at that moment and the malaya rosa into the red and out of the jersey karapas the 2019 jidor winner would open up almost a 30-second gap at one point but behind in the chase they would still work together and then nibbly attacked on the final classified climb of the day bringing jai hindley with him he'd be able to close the gap simon yates was in pursuit as well nebulae controlling his effort looking like the rider who won the judo in turin six years ago they'd all make contact over the top simon yates arriving with 13 k's to go joao almeida wasn't too far away neither was domenico pozzo vivo yates attacked with four and a half kilometers remaining given the fact he's almost 20 minutes down in the general classification the will to go after him wasn't quite as strong he demonstrated strength himself the man from northwest of england and despite his gc woes knee injury and problems on blockhouse he was there to take his second stage of this jiren italia after winning the time trial in budapest a sixth euro stage down the years as hindi took second kanapaz took third knee bally fourth yates winning the stage and richard karapas moving into the malayalosa 15 seconds between yates and those chasing him 28 seconds to ports of evil 39 to almeida with landa buchmann and juanpe lopez on the day's top ten yates showing that he's able to bounce back not up in the top of the gc as he'd want but he took that new stage win the second of the gyro for his team juan pelopez fought to the end he has now slipped though to ninth and a gc that before the day was separated by 128 top 10 now separated by 906. karapas the new leader seven seconds ahead of hindley zhuawal made us now in third and just as he took the mallards on stage 14 when he won the giro three years ago the ecuadorian superstar is back in pink and here's his first test defending the jersey it'll be sage 15 the last stage before the last of the rest days it takes the riders into the valdosta two first category climbed first up le fleur then veronia and a climb to a summit finish in konye with bonus seconds given out three kilometers before the finish line over four thousand meters of climbing another big day in the saddle and the first test for the new malaya rosa richard karapaz will be putting his ineos grenadiers team to work he can catch that stage and every day of the jira d'italia on gcn plus discovery plus and on the television on eurosport
